title: Dulux Decorator Centre is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dulux Decorator Centre is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
